title: Comme les cinq doigts de la main
original_title: Comme les 5 doigts de la main
overview: Five brothers similar yet different, raised by a mother widowed too early. One of them had left the family when he returns, pursued by a gang of smugglers, he find shelter in his family while reveling them a dark secret. The five brothers, together, will find the energy to defend themself and the means to avenge the memory of their murdered father...

trailers.title: Comme les 5 doigts de la main d'Alexandre Arcady
